description_long: This is a large, rectangular stone temple with a classical Greek architectural style, featuring a prominent colonnade of tall, fluted columns surrounding the structure on all sides. The temple sits on a raised platform accessed by a wide staircase, and the roof is adorned with sculpted pediments and decorative elements along the ridge. The front and rear facades are marked by triangular pediments supported by columns, with the front entrance centrally located and framed by the colonnade. Subtle gold accents are visible at the capitals of the columns, adding a touch of color to the otherwise pale stone exterior. The roofline is detailed with sculptural elements, possibly representing mythological figures or decorative motifs. The overall appearance is monumental, symmetrical, and exudes a sense of grandeur typical of ancient Greek temples such as the Parthenon.
description: A grand, rectangular stone temple with tall fluted columns, gold-accented capitals, and sculpted pediments, set on a raised platform with a wide staircase. The structure is richly detailed and evokes the classical Greek architectural tradition.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance framed by a row of columns and a triangular pediment, with the staircase leading up to the portico.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the long colonnade running the length of the temple and the decorative roofline, with the entrance less visible.
description_view_2: This rear-angled view mirrors the front, showing the symmetry of the structure and the rear pediment, with the staircase visible on the opposite side.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the back entrance, also framed by columns and a pediment, with the staircase leading up to the platform.
attribute_ornamentation: Moderate density of sculpted pediments, column capitals with gold accents, and decorative roofline elements, likely featuring mythological or geometric motifs.
attribute_entrance_design: A wide, rectangular entrance accessed by a broad staircase, framed by a row of tall fluted columns and topped with a triangular pediment; the entrance is unadorned but imposing, with gold-accented capitals.
